title: Better MC modified
description: An unofficial modified version of the Better MC modpack tweaked for my friends' needs.
body:
## This is an unofficial version of Better MC made for my friends.
_Specifically "Better MC [Fabric] BMC2"_

This project is for my friends. Due to a lack of features in the Modrinth app, this modpack has to be public. If you want, you can download and play this modpack. If you have issues, I will not help.
